creator: alexbestms@math.uni-muenster.de
text: the var "CONFLICTS=" in the Makefile of "emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3" and "emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage1" needs to be updated. it doesn't list "linux_base-f9*", "linux_base-f10*" and most of the ports specified no longer exist in the ports dir.
